name: polyterm
description: No-custody Polymarket intelligence, wallet, research, alert, and CLI tools.

tools.name: agent.schemas
tools.description: Return rich input/output schemas and safety metadata for one or all PolyTerm tools.

tools.name: agent.doctor
tools.description: Diagnose PolyTerm agent installation, schemas, manifests, MCP boot, APIs, and archive health.

tools.name: market.search
tools.description: Search active Polymarket markets by query.

tools.name: market.resolve
tools.description: Resolve a slug, URL, Gamma ID, condition ID, or token ID into market identifiers.

tools.name: market.top
tools.description: Return the top active Polymarket markets from live Gamma market data.
examples: What are the top 3 Polymarket markets today?
Show the most active markets right now.

tools.name: market.orderbook
tools.description: Return order book and spread analysis for a CLOB token ID.

tools.name: market.price_history
tools.description: Return CLOB-backed price history for a market.

tools.name: market.movers
tools.description: Return active markets that flipped or had large available price changes.
examples: What markets have flipped or spiked in the last 48 hours?

tools.name: market.flips
tools.description: Return active markets whose YES price crossed 50% within a CLOB price-history window.
examples: What are the top 3 markets that have flipped in the last 72 hours?
Which markets flipped below 50% in the last 48 hours?

tools.name: market.research
tools.description: Generate a flagship one-call market research brief with thesis, evidence, gaps, and workflow.

tools.name: market.explain_move
tools.description: Explain a recent YES price move with CLOB price history, order book context, and quality flags.

tools.name: market.compare
tools.description: Compare markets side by side with YES price gaps, recent moves, liquidity, and evidence quality flags.

tools.name: scan.opportunities
tools.description: Scan active markets for unusual moves, stale archive coverage, and research-worthy opportunities.

tools.name: analytics.arbitrage
tools.description: Scan Polymarket and optional venues for arbitrage opportunities.

tools.name: analytics.risk
tools.description: Assess market risk factors and return a scored explanation.

tools.name: archive.search
tools.description: Search locally archived PolyTerm research briefs.

tools.name: archive.status
tools.description: Report local archive coverage, freshness, and recommended refresh actions.

tools.name: wallet.inspect
tools.description: Inspect a wallet using public Data API and local PolyTerm evidence.

tools.name: wallet.whales
tools.description: Return wallet-level whale activity and smart-money candidates.

tools.name: wallet.whale_trades
tools.description: Return top public trade rows by notional value for a recent time window.
examples: Give me the top 5 whale trades in the last 24 hours and the markets they were placed in.

tools.name: wallet.smart_money
tools.description: Return locally identified high win-rate smart-money wallets ranked by edge score.

tools.name: trader.leaderboard
tools.description: Return active traders with recent volume and closed-position win-rate evidence.
examples: Give me the top 3 traders in the last 72 hours with an 80%+ win rate.

tools.name: analytics.thesis
tools.description: Generate an explainable market-level trade thesis.

tools.name: archive.manifest
tools.description: List local research archive datasets and quality flags.

tools.name: alerts.create_price_rule
tools.description: Create a local price alert rule.

tools.name: watch.scheduled_scan
tools.description: Run a long-running scheduled scan with optional notifications.

cli_commands.notes: Use the CLI help and command docs for exact options. Prefer manifest tools for stable adapter calls.
